case_title: DIANE DORRANS SACKS VS. STEVEN VOLPE DESIGN INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT STEVEN VOLPE DESIGN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2016 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO DEC-22-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIF DIANE DORRANS SAEKS AND DEFENDANT STEVEN VOLPE, ON BEHALF OF HIMSELF, AND AS OWNER OF STEVEN VOLPE DESIGN, INC. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO DEFENDANT STEVEN VOLPE DESIGN, INC. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO DEFENDANT STEVEN VOLPE THE INDIVIDUAL, BUT MR. VOLPE WAIVED SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AT TODAY'S HEARING. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DANIEL WEINGARTEN. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,850.00 FILED BY SAECKS, DIANE DORRANS AS TO DEFENDANT STEVEN VOLPE DESIGN INC. VOLPE, STEVEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED SEP-22-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STEVEN VOLPE DESIGN INC.
